# TakeawAI

> TakeawAI teaches everyday people how to use AI tools with confidence. Small-group live online classes and a monthly community membership. No tech background needed. No jargon.

## About

TakeawAI was founded by Michael Marciano — a former Teach First teacher, PropTech startup founder, and ex-Head of Product at a FTSE 20 company. He created TakeawAI to make practical AI education accessible to people who feel left behind by the pace of change: parents, grandparents, professionals, and anyone curious but overwhelmed.

TakeawAI is not a tech course. It is a practical skills course that happens to use AI tools. Students leave each session able to do something they could not do before.

## What TakeawAI Offers

### Live Classes
- **Free Taster Class**: A 45-minute introductory session. No payment required.
- **Single Class**: £29 per session. Live online, small group (max 8 people).
- **4-Class Series**: £99 for the full course. Four weekly sessions covering all core tools.

### Class Curriculum (Course 1: AI for Everyday Life)
- Class 1 — Your First AI Wow Moment: Using Google Lens and camera AI to identify plants, landmarks, and objects in real life.
- Class 2 — Write It in 30 Seconds: Using Claude and ChatGPT to write emails, plan trips, and summarise documents.
- Class 3 — Research, Discover, Create: Using Perplexity for research, Suno for AI music, NotebookLM for audio summaries.
- Class 4 — Build Your Personal AI Helper: Building spreadsheets in Claude, creating a personal AI assistant, understanding AI safety.

### Community Membership
- £5 per month (cancel anytime, no questions asked)
- Weekly AI tips and updates curated by Michael
- Class recordings on demand
- Monthly live Q&A session
- Peer community of people learning together

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Who it is for**: Adults aged 40–70 with no technical background. Parents and grandparents who want to understand and use AI in daily life.
- **Format**: Live online via video call. Small groups of up to 8 people.
- **Tools taught**: Claude (Anthropic), ChatGPT (OpenAI), Perplexity, Google Lens, Suno, NotebookLM
- **Location**: Online. Based in the UK. Classes taught in English.
- **Pricing**: Free taster / £29 single class / £99 four-class series / £5/month community
- **Teacher**: Michael Marciano — LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelmarciano/
- **Website**: https://takeawai.com

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do I need any technical experience?**
No. If you can use a browser and type a message, you have everything you need.

**What if I break something?**
You cannot break anything. Every tool used in class runs in a browser tab. Close the tab and it is gone. Nothing is installed on your computer.

**Is AI safe to use?**
Safety is covered in every session. Students learn exactly what to share and what to keep private.

**What tools do I need before the class?**
Nothing. No downloads, no installations. Just a device with a browser and an internet connection.

**Can I get a refund?**
Yes. If a class is not right for you, contact Michael directly.
